caption: The video features an older man with white hair and glasses, standing at a podium in what appears to be a library or community center, as indicated by the "Kellogg-Hubbard Library" sign on the podium. He is dressed in a blue shirt adorned with colorful patterns and a necklace, suggesting a cultural or traditional significance. The man is speaking into a microphone, likely addressing an audience that is partially visible in the foreground. His expression and posture indicate he is engaged in delivering a speech or presentation. The background consists of wooden blinds, adding to the formal yet intimate setting of the event. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the organization or channel broadcasting the event.
